page.title: Local SEO Landing Planner
page.subtitle: Plan + govern local page ideas. The Policy Shield flags which concepts are safe vs. spammy before any real page gets built. This tool publishes nothing.
page.notEnabled: Local SEO Landing Planner is not enabled.

edit.readyNote: Approved + ready to build. (Phase 2 = a planner-gated publisher; not built yet — this stays an internal signal until then.)
edit.putOnHold: Put it on hold to edit.
edit.editNotAllowed: Editing not allowed in this state.

empty.title: No blueprints yet
empty.body: A blueprint is a *page idea* — not a public page. Pick a starter to see how the Policy Shield flags it, or write your own from scratch. Nothing is published.

disclaimer.heading: Internal planning tool — publishes nothing
disclaimer.body: Local SEO Landing Planner is an internal planning tool. It does not publish pages, modify metadata, guarantee rankings, traffic, bookings, revenue, or Google visibility.
disclaimer.hinglish: Yeh planner batata hai kaunse local page ideas safe hain aur kaunse spam ya fake claim jaise lag sakte hain. Public page banane se pehle real photos, packages aur location proof zaroor chahiye.

explain.SAFE_BLUEPRINT: This concept reads as safe. Proof + governance review still required before any public page is built.
explain.NEEDS_PROOF: Concept makes a verifiable claim (location/amenity/market). Tick the proof checklist as evidence is gathered.
explain.RISKY_DOORWAY: Title uses superlative / overclaim language (best, cheapest, #1, guaranteed). Reword to a specific, honest claim.
explain.FAKE_LOCAL_CLAIM: Reviewer flagged a fake local claim. Rework the concept around a real, substantiated location.
explain.DUPLICATE_LOW_VALUE: Another live blueprint with the same title already exists for this hotel. Combine or differentiate.
explain.ON_HOLD: Reviewer parked this blueprint. Resume from the lifecycle bar when ready.

proof.noneRequired: No proof items required for this category. The Policy Shield will still flag superlatives.

form.whyItMattersPlaceholder: What kind of guest would land here, and what would convert them?
form.hinglishGuidancePlaceholder: e.g. "Asli photos chahiye, Char Dham route ka time honestly likhna."
form.safeNextActionPlaceholder: e.g. "Upload 5 real photos and a local-attractions list"
form.ownerNotes: Owner notes (visible to all hotel members)

override.title: Override the Policy Shield
override.body: Use only when a human assertion overrides the deterministic flag (e.g. you've verified a fake local claim, or are parking this idea). A reason is required and recorded in audit.
override.label: Override risk to
override.reasonPlaceholder: e.g. "Verified false claim — landmark is actually 80km away."

categoryHint.GEOGRAPHIC_FOCUS: Location/landmark-anchored ("Family stay in Mukteshwar"). Needs real location proof.
categoryHint.TRAVELER_NICHE: Audience-led ("Workation homestay", "Wellness retreat"). Substantiate with real amenities.
categoryHint.SEASONAL_POSITION: Time-of-year angle ("Monsoon retreat in Uttarakhand"). Tie to a real seasonal offer.
categoryHint.TARGET_MARKET: Source-market angle ("Weekend stay from Delhi NCR"). Needs an honest travel/route claim.
categoryHint.AMENITY_TRUST: Amenity/trust signal ("Parking-friendly stay"). Only if the amenity genuinely exists.
categoryHint.PACKAGE_LED: Built around a real Package Builder package. Strongest when the package is live.

validation.OVERRIDE_REASON_REQUIRED: When overriding the risk flag, a reason is required.

errors.NOT_AUTHORIZED: You don't have permission for that action.
errors.NOT_EDITABLE: This blueprint isn't editable in its current state. Hold it first.
errors.INVALID_TRANSITION: That lifecycle change isn't allowed from this state.
errors.NOTE_REQUIRED: A note is required when requesting changes.
errors.OVERRIDE_REASON_REQUIRED: When overriding the risk flag, a reason is required.
errors.RISK_BLOCKS_APPROVAL: Can't approve while the Policy Shield flags this blueprint as unsafe (risky / fake / duplicate). Fix the concept or override with a reason first.
